description_long: This vending machine features a robust, rectangular metal body with a slightly slanted front face. The front panel is dominated by a digital display screen with the word 'WINNER!' and a lightning bolt graphic, surrounded by a series of illuminated buttons and a central rotary control. The sides of the machine are adorned with cartoon-style illustrations of a nurse holding a syringe, adding a quirky, eye-catching element. The lower front section contains a wide retrieval slot, while the upper area displays three illuminated icons. The machine's surface is weathered, with visible bolts and a matte, industrial finish. The overall design suggests a prize or game vending machine, likely intended for entertainment or novelty use in urban environments.
description: A rugged, metal vending machine with a digital display, illuminated buttons, and cartoon nurse illustrations on the sides. The front features a prominent retrieval slot and bold 'WINNER!' signage.
description_view_0: The front view shows the digital display with 'WINNER!', a rotary control, multiple buttons, illuminated icons, and a wide retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a cartoon nurse illustration holding a syringe, with visible bolts along the lower edge.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain and unadorned, featuring a large, dark, rectangular panel with no visible controls or illustrations.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same cartoon nurse illustration and bolt details.
attribute_display_panel: A medium-sized rectangular digital screen is located on the upper front face, displaying 'WINNER!' and a lightning bolt graphic, with illuminated icons above.
attribute_payment_interface: No visible payment interface is present.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are six square, illuminated buttons arranged in two rows below the display, along with a central rotary control for selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front panel.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front panel features the word 'WINNER!' in green, 'WIN PRIZES!' on both sides in blue, and cartoon nurse illustrations on both side panels.
